description: Gate activation warmup diagnostic — GPU1 companion run. Same config as gate_warmup_diagnostic.json (GPU0/task_fd444d) but launched from post-PR#163+PR#164 main branch. Checkpoints include M_l matrices via save_checkpoint_with_context (PR #164), enabling Module 4 Grassmann distance analysis via memory_manifold_analysis.py (PR #163). Task: task_fd444d.
notes: GPU1 run. GPU0 run (same config, no context persistence): checkpoints/gate_warmup_diagnostic.safetensors / runs/gate_warmup_diagnostic.jsonl. Compare the two runs post-hoc with --module align --checkpoint ckpt_gpu1_5k.safetensors --compare-steps 5000.
